task: Polish 15: error code lookup via Settings > About > 'Search my bug' panel
summary: Polish 15: error code lookup via Settings > About > 'Search my bug' panel
reason: Chairman: '继续继续' (Polish 15). When the ErrorBoundary catches an error and shows a code (e.g. 'FE-3a7b9c2d'), users need a way to find that code in the logs without leaving the app. Added a new Tauri command `search_log(code, since)` in lib.rs that reads the daily rolling log files in <data_dir>/logs/, filters lines containing the code, and returns {matches, scanned, truncated}. Capped at 200 matches to keep the modal responsive. Panic files are excluded because their format is free-form backtrace. The frontend mounts a new SearchBugPanel component in the Settings > About card with a text input, Enter-to-search, and a pre-formatted result list. 9 new i18n keys were added in both zh-CN and en-US.
